channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Java (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Java nel periodo weekly.

item.title: ☕ dawdadsd/Bluetooth-headset-location-software (56 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: dawdadsd

📝 Repository: dawdadsd/Bluetooth-headset-location-software

📄 Descrizione: 因为本人蓝牙耳机比较小，也没买保护壳，导致蓝牙耳机总是莫名其妙忘记带或者遗落，所以做了一个关于这个蓝牙和耳机的定位扫描器，因为各个厂商其实对于贵的耳机都是能有相应的APP定位的，但是本人的耳机是华为Freeclip2，但是本人手机是小米17Pro。无法找到，所以做了这个App，用于监听蓝牙断开时间，记录断开蓝牙时耳机的最后已知的位置，然后在家以外的地方弹出遗落提醒，回到现场之后可以通过蓝牙做近距离搜索

⭐ Stelle: 56

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-10T03:56:02Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-16T03:03:42Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ jar-analyzer/jar-analyzer-engine (29 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jar-analyzer

📝 Repository: jar-analyzer/jar-analyzer-engine

📄 Descrizione: Java bytecode analysis engine built on ASM, extracts method call graphs, inheritance trees, Spring routes, and string constants from JAR/WAR into SQLite. AI-friendly output for security auditing.

⭐ Stelle: 29

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: bytecode call-graph code-audit java-asm java-bytecode static-analysis

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-19T13:44:01Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-23T03:25:08Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ chawdamrunal/JWTLens (24 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: chawdamrunal

📝 Repository: chawdamrunal/JWTLens

📄 Descrizione: JWTLens - Burp Suite extension for automated JWT security testing. 62 checks: passive scanning, algorithm confusion, signature bypass, KID injection, weak secret brute force, and a built-in JWT Forge tab. Works automatically as you browse.

⭐ Stelle: 24

🍴 Forks: 6

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: bug-bounty burp-extensions burpsuite cybersecurity jwt jwt-decode jwt-security jwtlens owasp security-scanner security-tools token-security vulnerability vulnerability-scanners web-security

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-10T09:39:09Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-15T10:41:24Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ shanqiu127/Warehouse-Management-System- (20 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: shanqiu127

📝 Repository: shanqiu127/Warehouse-Management-System-

📄 Descrizione: 2026 届毕业设计作品：仓库管理系统。项目采用前后端分离架构，前端基于 Vue 3 + Vite，后端基于 Spring Boot + MyBatis-Plus，数据库使用 MySQL。系统围绕实际仓储业务场景，完成了用户与权限管理、基础资料维护、进销退存流程、统计分析与可视化展示，具备完整的开发、部署与演示能力。

⭐ Stelle: 20

🍴 Forks: 6

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-18T14:11:24Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-23T03:16:01Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

item.title: ☕ AbgarSim/sieve-aml (13 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: AbgarSim

📝 Repository: AbgarSim/sieve-aml

📄 Descrizione: High-performance, open-source sanctions screening/watchlist engine for AML/KYC compliance. Features fuzzy (Jaro-Winkler), phonetic (Double Metaphone), and token-based name matching against OFAC, UN, EU & UK watchlists. Embeddable Java library with Vert.x and Spring Boot server modules, batch screening API, and audit trail support.

⭐ Stelle: 13

🍴 Forks: 3

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: aml anti-money-laundering audit-trail batch-screening compliance double-metaphone fintech fuzzy-matching jaro-winkler java kyc name-matching ofac open-source phonetic-matching regtech sanctions-screening spring-boot vert-x watchlist

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-18T08:29:28Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-21T05:08:56Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
